---
title: "01: SET3vsSET4"
params:                              
  experiment_id: SAB01_SAB08
  run_date: 2025-02-15
  author: "Shalise Burch"
output: html_document  
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: TRUE        
    warning: FALSE     
    message: FALSE     

---


## ---------
##  Setup
```{r libraries and avariables, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(here)


#exp_name <- params$experiment_id
data_path <- here("rnaseq", "01_data")
results_path <- here("rnaseq", "02_results")
rdata_path <- here("rnaseq", "03_rdata")

source(here("rnaseq", "00_scripts", "ScatterPlotFunctions.R"))

out_dir <- file.path(results_path, "Scatterplots2")
make_subdir(out_dir)

save_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "SET3 vs SET4")
make_subdir(save_dir)

```

```{r load gene lists}
SAB01_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")
SAB08_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB08/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB08_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")

head(names(SAB01_all), 20)
head(names(SAB08_all), 20)

my_contrasts <- c(
  "T21_CTRL_vs_D21_CTRL",
  "T21_RA_vs_D21_RA",
  "D21_RA_vs_D21_CTRL",
  "T21_RA_vs_T21_CTRL"
)
```
```{r}
run_scatter_between_sets <- function(all_list_x, all_list_y,
                                     contrast,
                                     days = NULL,
                                     label_x = "SET3", label_y = "SET4",
                                     exp_label = "SAB01_vs_SAB08",
                                     log_cut = 0.5, p_cut = 0.05,
                                     color_by = "DEG", autoprin = TRUE,
                                     out_dir,
                                     show_cor = TRUE, show_fit = TRUE) {

  # If days not provided, use overlap
  if (is.null(days)) {
    dx <- get_days_for_contrast(all_list_x, contrast)
    dy <- get_days_for_contrast(all_list_y, contrast)
    days <- intersect(dx, dy)
  }

  if (length(days) == 0) {
    message("No shared days for ", contrast, " between ", label_x, " and ", label_y)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  for (d in days) {

    key <- build_inner_key(contrast, d)

    if (is.null(all_list_x[[contrast]][[key]]) || is.null(all_list_y[[contrast]][[key]])) {
      message("Skipping ", d, " (missing key in one set).")
      next
    }

    df_x <- prep_for_scatter(all_list_x[[contrast]][[key]])
    df_y <- prep_for_scatter(all_list_y[[contrast]][[key]])

    # plotScatterAnalysis requires df1/df2 as object names
    var_x <- paste0(exp_label, "_", d, "_X")
    var_y <- paste0(exp_label, "_", d, "_Y")
    assign(var_x, df_x, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    assign(var_y, df_y, envir = .GlobalEnv)

    md <- list()
    md[[var_x]] <- paste0(label_x, " ", d, " ", gsub("_", " ", contrast))
    md[[var_y]] <- paste0(label_y, " ", d, " ", gsub("_", " ", contrast))

    p <- plotScatterAnalysis(
      df1 = var_x,
      df2 = var_y,
      ColorBy = color_by,
      AutoPrint = autoprin,
      label_genes = character(0),
      logCutoff = log_cut,
      pvalCutoff = p_cut,
      Metadata = md,
      out_dir = out_dir,
      ReturnDataOnly = FALSE,
      show_cor = show_cor,
      show_fit = show_fit
    )

    safe_ct <- gsub("_vs_", "-vs-", contrast, fixed = TRUE)
    fn <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(exp_label, "_", d, "_", safe_ct, "_", label_x, "_vs_", label_y, "_scatter.pdf"))
    ggplot2::ggsave(fn, p, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
    message("Saved: ", fn)
  }

  invisible(TRUE)
}
```

# Scatterplot 
```{r}
for (ct in my_contrasts) {
  run_scatter_between_sets(
    all_list_x = SAB01_all,
    all_list_y = SAB08_all,
    contrast   = ct,
    days       = NULL,          # auto overlap
    label_x    = "SAB01 (SET3)",
    label_y    = "SAB08 (SET4)",
    exp_label  = "SET3vsSET4",
    log_cut    = 0.5,
    p_cut      = 0.05,
    color_by   = "DEG",
    autoprin   = FALSE,
    out_dir    = save_dir,
    show_cor   = TRUE,
    show_fit   = TRUE
  )
}
```
